meta.name: Comfort Basics
meta.description: A bold, friendly, and impact-driven apparel store with a distinctive, slightly retro aesthetic. It uses a prominent display typeface, bold background colors (cream, yellow, green, navy), and large, expressive lifestyle photography. The brand emphasizes comfort, mission-driven shopping ('one purchased = one donated'), and clear category navigation.

header.notes: Includes a top announcement bar in navy blue. The main navigation features a chunky, bold sans-serif font for the logo and standard sans-serif for nav links. Right side includes 'Log In', search, and cart icons.

footer.description: Left side contains a '100% Happiness Guaranteed' message with a prominent logo and support text, plus a 'Get Help' button. Contains B-Corp certification logo in bottom right. Bottom includes typical legal links and fine print.
footer.notes: Spacious layout with a vertical dividing line between the brand promise section on the left and the link columns on the right.

productCard.notes: Minimal product cards in the 'New Arrivals' sections. Light grey placeholder image backgrounds. Product title, price, and colorway info below image. No visible 'add to cart' button on the card itself in this view.

productGrid.notes: Clean horizontal scrolling or standard grid depending on viewport. The screenshot shows 4 columns for product grids.

featuredProducts.label: New Arrivals
featuredProducts.heading: Women's
featuredProducts.notes: Features a heading block on the left with 'Shop All' and 'Shop Best Sellers' buttons stacked vertically. Product cards flow to the right of the heading block.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.layout: Full width, centered text, action items right.

design.styling: Thin bar at very top of page.

content.headline: Promotional shipping offer
content.specialElements: Region selector icon/text on far right.

sections.name: category-quick-links
sections.layout: Flexbox row, horizontally scrolling or evenly spaced banners.

design.styling: Slightly rounded rectangle images with dark overlays and centered text.

media.description: Close up horizontal slices of various product categories (underwear, socks, slippers, t-shirts).

sections.notes: Serves as visual quick navigation below the main header.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Split layout, image left (spanning full height), text right (centered vertically).

design.text: Extremely large, bold, black display typeface for headline. Regular sans-serif for subheadline.
design.styling: No borders. A small wavy graphic element sits above the headline.

content.headline: Bold statement about white classics
content.cta: 2 buttons: Solid dark grey/black with white text, slightly rounded corners (~0.25rem).

media.description: Two people sitting on modern stairs wearing white socks, bright lighting, clean aesthetic.

sections.notes: The large, heavy headline typography is a defining visual feature.

sections.name: shop-by-style-grid

design.text: Large, bold white text centered horizontally and vertically on each image.

content.cta: Single floating button overlapping the bottom center of the section: white pill shape with dark text and a closing 'x' icon.

media.description: Square lifestyle photos showing different sock styles in action (casual, compression, sport, dress).

items.title: Style Name
items.image: Lifestyle shot focused on feet/lower legs

content.specialElements: A floating promotional button 'Get 20% Off' overlaps this section.

sections.notes: Visually striking category navigation using prominent text overlays.

content.headline: Bold statement about donation model
content.body: Single sentence explaining the donation mechanism across all 50 states.

sections.notes: Acts as a strong, simple divider reinforcing brand values.

content.headline: Category and section title (Women's New Arrivals)

sections.layout: Flex container: Left column (narrow) for titles/actions, right area (wide) for scrolling product cards.

sections.name: impact-stats-banner

sections.notes: Cross-selling section introducing non-core product lines.
